name: Using Referer Field for Authentication
description: The product uses the HTTP Referer header for authentication or authorization decisions. The Referer field is entirely client-controlled and can be easily spoofed by attackers, making it an unreliable mechanism for validating request authenticity.
detection_pattern: Look for AUTH nodes (authentication check, authorization decision, access control) that consume INGRESS metadata (HTTP Referer header, referrer field) without an AUTH mediator (server-side session validation, cryptographic token verification, proper credential check) that provides a non-spoofable authentication mechanism independent of client-supplied headers.
